name: daruma-claude
description: Glue plugin: drives tupical/daruma (parse / decompose / plan / execute) and uses oh-my-claudecode /team as the executor. Ships /daruma-claude:{tasks,plan,next,mine,branch-tasks,start,doctor,setup,sync,capture,status,close} and a project-init that makes daruma the default tracker (overrides .omc/plans/). SessionStart hook proactively prints open tasks; Stop hook triggers auto-record.
